params.lensId: Regulatory lens used (e.g., "SCO6") or 0x0 for none
params.reportHash: SHA-256 content hash of the report data

params.stateRoot: Content hash of the pulse state_root object

getCqi(address,string).notice: CQI = sqrt(SII * PSI). Returns 0 if either score is missing.

publishReportHash(bytes32,bytes32,bytes4.notice: Publish the content hash of an off-chain report.

publishStateRoot(bytes32).notice: Publish the daily state root — covers all attestation domains.
